title: Senior Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
